name: Immich
description: Show images from a self-hosted Immich server

fields.name: mode
fields.label: Mode
fields.hint: Which images to show: a random image from the whole library, a random image from one album, a random favorite, or today's memories.

fields.name: albumId
fields.label: Album ID
fields.hint: UUID of the album — visible in the album URL.

fields.name: personId
fields.label: Person ID
fields.hint: Optional. UUID of a person to limit random images to — visible in the person's URL.

fields.name: metadataStateKey
fields.label: Metadata state key
fields.hint: Enter a state key to persist metadata about the image. Stores: {source, id, originalFileName, camera EXIF fields, people, ...}.

fields.name: saveAssets
fields.label: Save asset
fields.hint:
Save the downloaded image to disk as an asset. It'll be placed into the frame's assets folder.

You can later use the 'Local image' app to view saved assets.

If set to 'auto', the image will be saved if the frame is set to save assets. If set to 'always', the image will always be saved. If set to 'never', the image will never be saved.

fields.name: previewSize
fields.label: Image size
fields.hint: 'preview' is resized server-side and much lighter on frame memory. 'fullsize' downloads the original file.
